original_snippet_context: An official letter from the Municipal Chamber of Botucatu to the president of the State regarding the Taubaté Convention.
relevant_quote: a valorização do café e a fixação do cambio
justification: The letter explicitly links "valorização do café" (coffee valorization) with "fixação do cambio" (exchange rate stabilization), a key goal of the Caixa de Conversão as envisioned by expansionists.
